channel.title: Data Processing Agreement (DPA) on Flinker | The built-environment layer for Microsoft 365
channel.description: Recent content in Data Processing Agreement (DPA) on Flinker | The built-environment layer for Microsoft 365

item.title: Flinker Data Processing Agreement (v2026-05)
item.description:
Version: v2026-05 Effective date: 2026-05-15
Back to latest Download PDF Print

What’s new in v2026-05: Initial publication of the Flinker Data Processing Agreement pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR.

Table of Contents

  1. Subject Matter and Term
  2. Nature and Purpose of Processing
  3. Categories of Personal Data and Data Subjects
  4. Obligations of the Processor
  5. Obligations of the Controller
  6. Instructions
  7. Confidentiality
  8. Technical and Organisational Measures (TOMs)
  9. Sub-processors
  10. Assistance with Data Subject Rights
  11. Personal Data Breach Notification
  12. Audit Rights and Evidence of Compliance
  13. Deletion and Return of Data upon Termination
  14. Transfers to Third Countries
  15. Final Provisions

Between: Flinker GmbH, Zittelstraße 7, 80796 Munich, Germany, Amtsgericht München HRB 254870 (hereinafter “Processor”)
and: the customer identified in the Main Contract (hereinafter “Controller”)
